task_completion.description: Open the Green Valley Water Facility record in CAMEO Data Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager interface with the 'Green Valley Water Facility' record opened.

task_completion.description: Update the maximum daily amount for Chlorine to 60,000 lbs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the inventory record for Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) with the maximum daily amount field set to 60,000.

task_completion.description: Update the average daily amount for Fluorosilic Acid to 55,000 lbs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the inventory record for Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4) with the average daily amount field set to 55,000.

task_completion.description: Add Sodium Hypochlorite as a new liquid, non-EHS chemical
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a new chemical record being created for Sodium Hypochlorite (CAS 7681-52-9) with 'Liquid' selected and EHS unchecked or marked as non-EHS.

task_completion.description: Set amounts and storage details for Sodium Hypochlorite
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Sodium Hypochlorite with average daily amount 8,500, maximum daily amount 15,000, storage location 'Chemical Injection Room', storage type 'Above ground tank', pressure 'Ambient pressure', and temperature 'Ambient temperature'.

task_completion.description: Export the updated Tier II dataset as XML to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the export dialog or a file save dialog saving the file as 'green_valley_2024.xml' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO'.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to make updates
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager application windows, buttons, and forms, rather than a terminal or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the XML file directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing the XML file opened in Notepad, VS Code, or any other text editor where the agent manually types the changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through the application's menu (e.g., File -> Export) to generate the XML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating a synthetic facility 'Green Valley Water Facility'. Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) max amount must be updated to 60,000. Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4) avg amount must be updated to 55,000. Sodium Hypochlorite (CAS 7681-52-9) must be added as a new chemical. Note: Ignore any discrepancies regarding EPCRA Tier II amount codes (e.g., code 07 vs 08/09); focus strictly on verifying that the exact numerical values (60,000, 55,000, 15,000, 8,500) were entered into the respective fields.
